title: WebSiteMCP Manifest
description: Meta-schema for a WebSiteMCP manifest: the per-site declaration of which contracts, which methods of each, and which binding version are live. The manifest's declared methods are the single source of truth for what is callable; a method the manifest omits never appears in the tool surface. Lives at domain/<reverse-DNS path>/manifest.json (e.g. domain/com/svb/www/); the path is the site's identity. Part of WebSiteMCP spec version 1.0.

version.description: Manifest version. Bumps when declared support changes or a contract/binding pin is re-pinned.

contracts.description: The categories this site exposes, each pinned to an exact contract version and an exact binding version.

id.description: Contract category id. Resolves to contract/<id>@<version>.json.

version.description: Exact pinned contract version. Must equal the binding's satisfiesContract. Pins are exact, never ranges; nothing auto-upgrades.

binding.description: Exact binding version to load. Resolves to <id>@<binding>.json beside this manifest. Free to move under a fixed contract version.

methods.description: The subset of the contract's methods that are live on this site. Must be a subset of the contract's methods and include the contract's required core. Becomes the callable tool list.
